name: Pinky
flavor: Co-op Threat from Book 3 ('A New Threat'). Attack text is confirmed (Book 3 p9). Defense/Toughness here are a best read of the box-side profile and should be verified against the physical box.
target: The Target symbol on the box-side illustration; used for line-of-sight and range to Pinky.

attack.name: Attack
attack.summary: Place 1 Shield token on all valid targets. Place 1 Heart on all Little Soldiers (whether they are valid targets or not).

superSpecialAbility.summary: On 3+ Lightning in the collective Threat attack, activate Pinky's Super Special Ability. The exact text is printed on the physical box side (Threat profiles are not in any rulebook) — verify from the box.
